output.content: {"posts":[{"id":"DAY1-055","author":"ShadowWalker_99","text":"You think you're safe? I know where you sleep, @TargetUser. I've been watching your socials for weeks. Don't test me.","category":"Harassment","correctAction":"Escalate","difficulty":"Medium","explanation":"The post requires escalation because it depicts a pattern of sustained stalking and threats of unwanted contact rather than a single isolated insult.
